disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe, constant right-sided flank and back pain, present for about twelve hours
trigger_question_examples: Can you describe the pain in your side?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's a deep, constant, severe ache in my right side and the middle of my back on that side. It doesn't come and go — it's just there the whole time.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: High fever with violent shaking chills (rigors) beginning about twelve hours ago
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any fevers or chills?
Have you been shivering or shaking?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes — about twelve hours ago I came over burning hot and then started shaking violently, the sort of shaking I couldn't stop.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Recurrent vomiting; unable to keep down any fluids or oral medication
trigger_question_examples: Have you been able to keep any fluids down?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've thrown up every single sip of water since lunchtime. I even brought my paracetamol tablets back up whole — nothing stays down.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Two-day prodrome of burning on urination, urinary frequency, and cloudy foul-smelling urine
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any burning or stinging when you pass urine?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It started a couple of days ago with stinging when I weed and needing to go constantly, and my wee went cloudy and smelt really bad.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Lightheadedness and faintness on standing, marked weakness, confined to bed (volume-depletion / perfusion proxy)
trigger_question_examples: Do you feel dizzy or faint, especially when you stand up?
How are you feeling in yourself overall?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I feel really dizzy and like I might faint whenever I sit up or stand. I'm too weak to get to the bathroom on my own.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: General malaise, exhaustion and feeling unwell all over (systemic illness)
trigger_question_examples: How unwell do you feel overall?
Are you managing your normal activities?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I feel completely wiped out and unwell all over — I've never felt this bad with a water infection before.
